category_sources: source_facts.description says fabio is a zero-conf load balancing HTTP(S) router.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official fabiolb/fabio repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/fabiolb/fabio, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies load balancing and HTTP(S) routing.
source_facts.executables lists fabio as the executable.
